series_metadata.series_title: Employee Exit Questionnaire Data in HR2000
series_metadata.series_description: Data collected from the Employee Exit Questionnaire (567-OAG-64) and entered into HR2000 database. The data does not contain all of the information from the Employee Exit Questionnaire. Any use derived from the information comes from the paper form when it is completed. There is no use for the data entered into HR2000. Therefore, the office is no longer entering data from the Employee Exit Questionnaire into HR2000 and seeks to dispose of the information contained in HR2000 since the process is now obsolete.

retention_rules.disposition: Electronic: One-Time Disposal – destroy upon approval of this retention schedule, Electronic: Delete
